summary: Iteration 124 testing complete: Quick Meditate FAB, Founder Badge system, and Enhanced Multi-Category Leaderboard. All backend APIs pass (10/10). All frontend features verified working correctly.
seed_data_creation: None - used existing test user with claimed Founder badge
context_for_next_testing_agent: All iteration 124 features verified. Test user has Founder badge claimed. Founder's Harmonic (432.11Hz) appears in Cosmic Mixer for founders.

founder_status_api.details: Returns is_founder=true, badge data, and exclusive_frequency (432.11Hz)

claim_founder_api.details: Returns 'already_claimed' for existing founder with badge data

enhanced_leaderboard_api.details: Returns 4 categories: leaderboard (Shining Brightest), brightest_aura, most_helpful, founders

leaderboard_structure.shining_brightest: PASS - Contains rank, character_name, origin_id, level, xp, chapter, achievements, is_founder
leaderboard_structure.brightest_aura: PASS - Contains rank, character_name, radiates, level, is_founder
leaderboard_structure.most_helpful: PASS - Contains rank, character_name, contributions, level, is_founder
leaderboard_structure.founders: PASS - Contains rank, character_name, aura_color, granted_at, is_founder=true

visibility_rules.auth_page: PASS - FAB NOT visible on '/auth' (hidden route)
visibility_rules.cosmic_mixer: PASS - FAB NOT visible on '/cosmic-mixer' (hidden route)

starseed_realm_page.founder_badge_display: PASS - data-testid='founder-badge-display' shows 'Cosmic Founder' with 'Exclusive Founder's Harmonic unlocked in Mixer'
